functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Peeper Guide
pages:
Peeper Guide

A Choascraft guide for peepers, the bright little fish inspired by Subnautica.

Fact 1

Peepers are known for their oversized eye and quick, darting movement.

Fact 2

In Subnautica, peepers are small alien fish found around safe shallow waters.

Fact 3

Their big eye makes them instantly recognizable, even among colorful reef life.

Fact 4

Peepers are often one of the first fish players notice while exploring alien oceans.

Fact 5

They are fast for their size, so catching one by hand can take a little chasing.

Fact 6

Peepers are useful survival fish in Subnautica because they can be caught for food.

Choascraft Peepers

Peepers spawn underwater in oceans and rivers in groups of 3 to 6.

Variants

Choascraft peepers have green, blue, purple, and red variants.

Buckets

Use a bucket on a peeper to scoop it into a matching Peeper Bucket item.

Breeding

Peepers breed with kelp. Their babies grow over time.

Movement

Peepers swim, wander, idle, avoid threats, and flock with nearby water mobs.

Ocean Role

Peepers are small prey fish. They help make the water feel alive and give hunters something to chase.

Keeper Note

Bring buckets if you want colors for an aquarium. Bring kelp if you want more peepers.
